addFolderButton.description: Button hover text to add a new folder.

addPromptButton.description: Button hover text to add a new prompt.

closeSettings.description: Button text to close the settings view.

collapseAll.description: Button text to collapse all prompts.

confirmDeleteFolder.description: Confirmation message for deleting a folder.
confirmDeleteFolder.message: 이 폴더를 삭제하시겠습니까? 이 폴더의 프롬프트는 삭제되지 않습니다!

confirmDeletePrompt.description: Confirmation message for deleting a prompt.

enterNewFolderName.description: Prompt message for entering a new folder name.

expandAll.description: Button text to expand all prompts.

extDescription.message: 개인 데이터베이스에 프롬프트 템플릿을 복사, 편집 및 저장하고 대부분의 AI/LLM 웹사이트에서 사용하세요.

extName.message: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Kimi, DeepSeek 등을 위한 XXL 프롬프트 관리자!

extShortName.description: The short name of the extension.

folderNamePlaceholder.description: Placeholder for new folder name input.

hideButton.description: Button text to hide the add prompt form.

iconDragTip.description: Tip about dragging the icon to reposition it.

importErrorNoTitlePrompt.description: Error message when CSV for import is missing columns.
importErrorNoTitlePrompt.message: CSV 파일에 "제목" 및 "프롬프트" 열이 포함되어야 합니다.

importErrorParse.description: Error message when CSV for import is empty or cannot be parsed.
importErrorParse.message: CSV 파일을 구문 분석할 수 없거나 비어 있습니다.

importSuccess.description: Success message after importing prompts from CSV.

keyboardShortcuts.description: Header for keyboard shortcuts section in settings.

newPromptPlaceholder.description: Placeholder for new prompt text area.

promptTitlePlaceholder.description: Placeholder for new prompt title input.

publicPromptsComingSoon.description: Info text for public prompts tab.

rateExtension.description: Button text to rate the extension.

selectFolder.description: Default option in folder select dropdown.

showIconSwitch.description: Switch to show icon on LLMs.

showIconSwitchOff.description: Show text if icon is swichted off
showIconSwitchOff.message: 툴바에 확장 프로그램을 고정하는 것을 잊지 마세요 (퍼즐 아이콘). Alt+P를 눌러 사이드바를 열 수도 있습니다!

sortZA.description: Sort option for reverse alphabetical order.
